alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with two promotions; demonstrated scaling of global commercial operations and transformation programs with cross-functional coordination and execution ownership
alignments.job_requirement: Lead FDEs through high-stakes, ambiguous customer deployments and own technical and business value outcomes end to end

alignments.candidate_evidence: Strategic and operational leadership background with stakeholder management across business and technical functions; experienced in translating operational insights into strategic inputs
alignments.job_requirement: Partner closely with Product, Research, Sales, and GTM to ensure fieldwork informs roadmap priorities and drives exploration

alignments.candidate_evidence: Two promotions at Google indicate demonstrated capability to scale and lead; background in building scalable operational models and team leadership
alignments.job_requirement: Set a high bar for team performance and support growth through direct, actionable feedback

alignments.candidate_evidence: No evidence of direct management of field engineers or customer-facing technical teams; background is operations, strategy, and program leadership
alignments.job_requirement: 2+ years managing high-performing FDE or customer-facing engineers

alignments.candidate_evidence: Python basic and actively learning; no evidence of writing or reviewing production-grade code in either language
alignments.job_requirement: Write and review production-grade code across frontend and backend using Javascript or Python

gaps.gap: No direct management experience with Forward Deployed Engineers or field-based technical delivery teams; candidate's management background is in operations and strategic programs, not customer-facing technical engineering teams
gaps.mitigation: If candidate has managed cross-functional technical projects involving customer delivery, that context could transfer, but FDE-specific management (handling field pressure, technical escalations, on-site decision-making) is distinct from ops management and would require ramp-up.

gaps.gap: Cannot write or review production-grade Python or JavaScript code; role explicitly requires hands-on code review and technical depth in these languages across frontend and backend systems
gaps.mitigation: Role states FDE managers must 'write and review production-grade code'; this is a hard boundary for managing engineering teams. No operational background substitutes for this technical credibility with engineers.

gaps.gap: No evidence of leading prototype-to-production technical delivery with ambiguous problem statements or frontier research integration; background is primarily commercial and operational scaling
gaps.mitigation: Strategic program leadership may transfer in ambiguity handling, but the fusion of research uncertainty, production deployment pressure, and field-based problem solving is specialized. Candidate would need significant ramp on this dimension.

gaps.gap: No documented consulting or field-deployment experience; role requires deep comfort with on-site customer work, travel (25%), and managing teams under field pressure
gaps.mitigation: International operations experience and global scaling suggest some cross-region comfort, but embedded customer deployment is a different model. London location and hybrid work model are feasible.

hard_blockers.evidence: "Write and review production-grade code across frontend and backend using Javascript or Python." Candidate profile states "Python basic and actively learning" with "no production software-engineering background." Role requires hands-on technical code review as a core duty of team leadership.

output.level_rationale: Manager role with 8+ years experience required, 2+ years managing technical teams, leading high-pressure projects end-to-end, and direct influence on product roadmap signals. Reporting to OpenAI research/product leadership and owning customer-facing technical delivery outcomes. Estimated L5 (Senior IC or Manager with established ownership scope)."
output.summary: Manager, Forward Deployed Engineering requires hands-on production code review in Python/JavaScript, 2+ years managing FDE teams through high-stakes field deployments, and deep technical credibility with engineering teams. Candidate brings strong strategic leadership, global operations scaling, and cross-functional partnership experience, but has no FDE management background, cannot code-review production systems, and lacks field-deployment experience. The hard blocker on production code review as a core duty disqualifies this application; operations and strategy leadership, while valuable, do not substitute for the technical engineering manager credibility this role demands.
uncertainties: Candidate's exact scope and team size managed at Google not specified; level of technical depth in previous roles unclear
Whether candidate has any hands-on involvement in technical delivery projects beyond program management
Extent of customer/field interaction in previous commercial operations roles
OpenAI company stage and FDE team maturity context not stated in JD
